headline: Final release hotfix adds safer image loading and fallback behavior, a steadier mobile dock feel on narrow phones, and release-check guidance for slow-network visual comfort.
notes: Images now get async decoding, smarter eager/lazy loading, and a safer fallback path so hero and card media recover more gracefully on slower mobile networks.
Media containers now show a soft editorial loading state instead of abrupt blanks, then fade images in once they are ready.
If the logo mark or card media fails to load, the UI now falls back more cleanly instead of leaving broken-feeling empty states.
Release check now reminds testers to verify image recovery and small-screen comfort together during final sign-off.
